---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / use case**
What are you trying to do that HydraMind does not support today?

**Proposed direction**
What you'd like to see. If it touches a layer boundary (harness / control /
gating / orchestration / governance), note which.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you weighed.

**Scope note**
HydraMind is alpha and goal-driven; some capabilities (parallel node execution,
replanning, LLM-as-judge gates) are already on the roadmap (P1/P2). Check the
CHANGELOG and architecture docs first.
